feat.name: Crawling Form
feat.text: You can transform into a small animal or celestial creature to scurry and spy. You can Change Shape to assume a crawling form. While in crawling form, you gain the effect of a 1st-rank *pest form*, except you can transform only into a shape matching your heritage; for example, if you were once were a wolf, you turn into a wolf puppy.

traits.name: Yaoguai
traits.text: Beings who usually begin their existence as simple animals, objects, or plants, but have found a means to transcend their original forms through the power of cultivation.
